metadata.description: The complete Claude Code toolkit for SaaS founders - from idea to launch.

plugins.name: saas-toolkit
plugins.description: Full-stack SaaS toolkit: 15 skills + 4 agents (mentor, PRD writer, code reviewer, QA tester). Covers Next.js, Supabase, Vercel, PostHog, Polar.sh, AI SDK, SEO, and launch readiness.
